title: Elementary Turkish
catalogDescription: Introduction to modern Turkish. Pronunciation and conversation, grammar and composition, graded reading. Latin characters used throughout. Third in a sequence of three. Maximum 15 credits allowed between TKISH 101; TKISH 102; TKISH 103; and TKISH 105. Prerequisite: TKISH 102.

title: Intermediate Turkish
catalogDescription: Introduction to modern Turkish literature. First in a sequence of three. Prerequisite: either TKISH 103 or TKISH 105.
